title: RunState grammar + careful-mode chat spawn + /careful toggle
description: Lay the spine for chat-driven approval. Extend the RunState status grammar additively with 'input-required' and 'paused' plus optional pending/pause fields. Add an additive `bober run --approve-gates <comma-list>` flag that merges {gate -> 'disk'} into config.pipeline.checkpointOverrides for that run only. Add a session-persisted `/careful on|off` toggle (chat sidecar) and make RunSpawner pass the curated `--approve-gates post-research,post-plan,post-sprint` to the detached child when careful is on. After this sprint a chat user can launch an approval-gated run whose curated gates actually fire pending markers, while autopilot spawns are unchanged.

successCriteria.description: The project builds with zero TypeScript errors (npm run build) and typecheck is clean in strict mode (npm run typecheck).
TypeScript compilation produces zero type errors in strict mode (npm run typecheck).
All tests pass with zero failures, including new tests for the grammar extension, --approve-gates parsing, and the /careful toggle (npm run test).

RunState.status accepts 'input-required' and 'paused' and the optional fields pendingCheckpointId/pendingPrompt/pendingSince/pausedAt round-trip through writeRunState/readRunState. A unit test writes a RunState with status 'input-required' + pending fields and reads it back unchanged; an existing-status RunState (running/completed/failed/aborted) still round-trips.

`bober run --approve-gates post-research,post-plan,post-sprint` merges {post-research:'disk', post-plan:'disk', post-sprint:'disk'} into config.pipeline.checkpointOverrides for that run; without the flag, checkpointOverrides is left as-is (today's behavior). A unit test asserts the merge and asserts an unknown gate name (not a declared checkpoint id) is rejected with a clear error.

`/careful on` / `/careful off` persists the careful flag in a chat-scoped sidecar across turns; `/careful` with no arg reports the current state. A unit test toggles and re-reads the sidecar via a fresh instance.

When careful is on, RunSpawner.spawn launches the detached child with `--approve-gates post-research,post-plan,post-sprint` appended to the args; when off (default), no --approve-gates is present and the args equal Phase 1's exactly. A unit test inspects the injected spawnFn args in both states.

nonGoals: Do not surface pending approvals in chat yet (read path is Sprint 2)
Do not write approve/reject markers from chat yet (write path is Sprint 3)
Do not add guidance injection or pause/resume (Sprints 4 and 5)
Do not modify the DiskCheckpointMechanism, approval-state.ts, or the existing approve/reject CLI
Do not change autopilot spawn behavior or the pipeline algorithm
stopConditions: A careful chat spawn launches with the curated --approve-gates; an autopilot spawn is byte-for-byte unchanged from Phase 1; the RunState grammar extension round-trips; build + typecheck + full suite green
definitionOfDone: RunState gains 'input-required'/'paused' and the optional pending/pause fields (additive, round-tripping). `bober run` gains an additive --approve-gates flag that merges disk overrides for the named gates only, rejecting unknown gate names. A session-persisted /careful on|off toggle exists, and RunSpawner passes the curated approve-gates to the detached child when careful is on while leaving autopilot spawns identical to Phase 1. Build, typecheck, and the full suite pass.
assumptions: The set of valid checkpoint ids is the pipeline's declared sites (post-research, post-plan, post-sprint-contract, post-sprint, pre-curator, pre-generator, pre-evaluator, pre-code-reviewer, end-of-pipeline). The validator for --approve-gates checks membership in this set.
The careful sidecar is keyed by sessionId and lives under .bober/chat/ (mirrors src/chat/pid-sidecar.ts). Default state is off (autopilot), preserving Phase 1.
Merging into checkpointOverrides (override wins over mode) is sufficient to activate only the curated gates without setting --mode careful.
generatorNotes:
Additive, low-risk plumbing. Verified touch points:
- src/mcp/run-manager.ts:34 (interface RunState): extend the status union to add 'input-required' | 'paused'; add optional fields pendingCheckpointId?: string; pendingPrompt?: string; pendingSince?: string; pausedAt?: string. Keep dist/.d.ts in sync only via build (do not hand-edit dist). Check no exhaustive switch on status breaks (search for status === and switch(status)).
- src/state/run-state.ts: writeRunState/readRunState already serialize the whole object — no change needed beyond the type. Add a round-trip test in src/state/run-state.test.ts (or a new test) for the new status + fields.
- src/cli/commands/run.ts: the --mode override at :104-107 is the pattern to mirror. Add a `--approve-gates <gates>` commander option (registered in src/cli/index.ts under the `run` command alongside --mode/--run-id/--team) and a RunCommandOptions field approveGates?: string. Parse comma-separated, trim, validate each against the known checkpoint-id set, and merge { [gate]: 'disk' } into config.pipeline.checkpointOverrides (spread the existing record). Reject unknown gates with a clear thrown error / process.exitCode=1 + stderr message (mirror existing error style). Do NOT also force --mode; the override is enough.
- Known checkpoint-id set: define a small exported const (e.g. KNOWN_CHECKPOINT_IDS) — source it from the checkpoint sites if a list already exists (src/orchestrator/checkpoints/sites.ts has post-research/post-plan; the full set is enumerated in pipeline.ts). A literal tuple is acceptable; add a comment pointing at the pipeline sites.
- New src/chat/careful-sidecar.ts: mirror src/chat/pid-sidecar.ts (read/write a small JSON under .bober/chat/<sessionId>.careful.json). API: isCareful(): Promise<boolean>, setCareful(on: boolean): Promise<void>. Tolerate missing file => false.
- src/chat/slash-commands.ts: add a `/careful` case. It needs access to the careful sidecar — thread a carefulHandler callback the way stopHandler was threaded (dispatch already takes optional handlers; mirror that to stay back-compat with 2-arg callers). `/careful on` -> set true + 'Careful mode ON — new runs will pause at curated gates.'; `/careful off` -> set false; `/careful` (no arg) -> report current.
- src/chat/chat-session.ts: construct the CarefulSidecar; pass its state into RunSpawner.spawn (add an options arg or a per-call careful boolean). When spawning (action.action === 'spawn' at :162), read careful state and pass it so RunSpawner appends --approve-gates.
- src/chat/run-spawner.ts: spawn() at :93 builds args ['run', task, '--run-id', runId]; when careful, append ['--approve-gates', 'post-research,post-plan,post-sprint']. Keep the careful arg optional with default off so existing run-spawner tests pass unchanged.
Keep everything additive and default-off. Tests: temp dirs, inject spawnFn to capture args, no network. Run npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test before handoff.
evaluatorNotes:
sc-1-4: write+read a RunState with status 'input-required' and all four optional fields; assert deep-equal round-trip; also round-trip a 'paused' and a legacy 'running' state.
sc-1-5: call the run-command option parsing/merge with --approve-gates post-research,post-plan,post-sprint and assert checkpointOverrides has the three 'disk' entries and nothing else changed; call with an unknown gate ('bogus') and assert a clear error and no partial merge applied (or that valid gates still apply per the AC wording — match the generator's chosen semantics but require the error to be surfaced).
sc-1-6: toggle /careful on, construct a fresh CarefulSidecar for the same sessionId, assert isCareful() true; toggle off, assert false; /careful with no arg returns a state report string.
sc-1-7: with careful on, capture RunSpawner.spawn's injected spawnFn args and assert they include '--approve-gates' and the curated list; with careful off, assert the args exactly equal the Phase 1 arg vector (no --approve-gates).
Regression: existing run-spawner, chat-session, slash-commands, run-state, run-manager tests stay green. Confirm no exhaustive status switch broke. Run npm run build, npm run typecheck, npm run test.
